mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, chunk_index, content, embedding_model, embedding_dim, token_count, chunk_meta, score_avg, hit_count, created_at FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index
SELECT id, document_id, chunk_index, content, embedding, embedding_model, embedding_dim, token_count, chunk_meta, score_avg, hit_count, created_at FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL

SELECT id, document_id, chunk_index, content, embedding, embedding_model, embedding_dim, token_count, chunk_meta, score_avg, hit_count, created_at FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL AND document_id IN
#{did}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk (document_id, chunk_index, content, embedding, embedding_model, embedding_dim, token_count, chunk_meta, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{embedding,typeHandler=com.example.minimall.config.FloatArrayTypeHandler}, #{embeddingModel}, #{embeddingDim}, #{tokenCount}, #{chunkMeta}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_chunk SET hit_count = hit_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
